description: Egészítsd ki a mondatokat a megfelelő mutató névmással: this, that, these vagy those.

items.sentence: ______ is my phone here in my hand.
Look at ______ big house over there!
______ keys on my table are mine.
______ dogs in the park over there are very nice.
I like ______ book here. It is very good.
______ laptop on that desk over there is old.
Who are ______ people across the street?
______ office here is very nice and big.
Look at ______ blue birds up in the tree!
Can you see ______ star in the sky?
______ apple here in my basket is sweet.
______ children playing over there are happy.
Is ______ your pen next to your computer?
______ windows across the room are open.
I want to buy ______ black car next to me.
Do you see ______ high mountain over there?
______ shoes on my feet are very comfortable.
______ man sitting at the desk over there is our boss.
______ cups here on our table are dirty.
______ clouds up in the sky look like a big dog.
______ problem we are fixing right now is very simple.
Look at ______ white boat out on the river!
______ keys here in my pocket are for the office.
______ flowers in the garden across the street are beautiful.
______ screen here in front of me is very clean.
______ people standing at the bus stop over there are late.
Is ______ coffee here on my desk yours?
______ stars in the sky tonight are very bright.
______ room here is our main office.
______ bags on the floor over there belong to the students.
______ cat sleeping next to my chair is very small.
Who lives in ______ house across the road?
______ pencils here in my hand are black.
______ birds flying high up in the sky are fast.
______ lesson today is very important for you.
Look at ______ large tree at the end of the street!
______ photos here in my phone are beautiful.
______ employees working in that office over there are busy.
______ sandwich here on my plate looks great.
______ mountains far away have snow on them.
______ telephone next to your hand is ringing.
______ boxes on the top shelf over there are empty.
______ glass of water here is cold and nice.
Who is ______ girl standing near the door over there?
______ letters here on my desk are for the manager.
Look at ______ airplanes up in the sky!
______ chair here next to me is broken.
______ lights across the river look beautiful at night.
______ computer in front of me is working fast.
______ apartments across the street are very expensive.
